creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sat         2007-12-14 18:52:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/linux-netscape-navigator Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
    www/linux-netscape-navigator/files 
                                       linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in 
  Log:
  Add port www/linux-netscape-navigator:
  
  Netscape Navigator is a proprietary browser from AOL Netscape based on
  Mozilla Firefox.
  
  This is a pre-compiled Linux/i386 version.
  
  WWW: http://browser.netscape.com/
  
  PR:             ports/117266 (based on)
  Submitted by:   Pietro Cerutti <gahr@gahr.ch>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1928    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/www/linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +180 -0    ports/www/linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +222 -0    ports/www/linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-plist (new)
